---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new skill or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[skill] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What gap does this fill?

Which step in the pipeline is missing this, or what failure mode does it fix?

## Proposed skill / change

Brief description of what the skill would do or what would change.

## Grounding

Is this based on a book, methodology, or observed failure pattern? (A grounded skill is more likely to be accepted than a general best-practice.)

## Would you like to contribute it?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting
